typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Data_Src as string (),
	Duplicate_Rec as string (),
	dw_runkey as integer (),
	dw_run_cncl_dt as timestamp (),
	dw_run_eff_dt as timestamp (),
	dw_run_month as integer (),
	Initial_Catalog1 as string (),
	MaxSK as integer (),
	password as string (),
	projectID as integer (),
	timeSheetID as integer (),
	User_Name as string (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_MaxSK as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string ()
}

source(output(
		Date as date,
		TimeTaken as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		MajorTaskID as integer,
		MinorTaskID as integer,
		DefectID as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		CategoryID as integer,
		SubcategoryID as integer,
		TimeSheetID as integer,
		Modified as timestamp,
		Category as string,
		Subcategory as string,
		Title as string,
		ProjectID as integer,
		LoginName as string,
		DeliverableID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        TimeSheetID, CONVERT(date, [Date]) AS Date, TimeTaken, DW_Run_Key, ProjectID, MajorTaskID,DeliverableID, MinorTaskID, Category, Subcategory, DefectID, LOWER(RTRIM(LTRIM(ResourceName))) LoginName,                          DW_Upsert_Flag, CategoryID, SubcategoryID, Modified, Title FROM            src.stg_TimeSheet WHERE        (DW_Run_Key = ?)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCTimeSheet	source(output(
		DateSK as timestamp,
		Date as date,
		DateLocal as timestamp,
		DayName as string,
		DayNumberInWeek as integer,
		DayNumberInMonth as integer,
		DayNumberInYear as integer,
		WeekNumberInMonth as integer,
		WeekNumberInYear as integer,
		MonthNumberInYear as integer,
		MonthShortName as string,
		MonthLongName as string,
		QuarterInYear as string,
		Quarter as string,
		HalfYear as string,
		FullYear as integer,
		FinancialYear as integer,
		QuarterInFinancialYear as string,
		DisplayFinancialYear as string,
		DisplayFinancialMonth as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dw.D_Date',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPDateLKPTABLE	source(output(
		DefectSk as integer,
		DefectID as integer,
		DefectProjectID as integer,
		DefectDeliverableID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DefectSk       ,DefectID             ,(select projectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=df.DefectProjectSk) as DefectProjectID             ,(select DeliverablesID from dw.d_Deliverables where DeliverableSK=df.DefectDeliverableSK) as DefectDeliverableID   FROM dw.D_Defects as df where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPDefectLKPTABLE	source(output(
		DeliverableSK as integer,
		DeliverablesID as integer,
		DProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        DeliverableSK, DeliverablesID, (select ProjectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=DeliverableProjectSk) as DProjectID FROM            dw.D_Deliverables WHERE DW_Current_Flag = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPDeliverableLKPTABLE	source(output(
		MajorTaskSK as integer,
		MajorTasksID as integer,
		MajorTaskProjectID as integer,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        MajorTaskSK,  MajorTasksID,  (select projectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=mt.MajorTaskProjectSK) as MajorTaskProjectID, MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK  FROM            dw.D_MajorTasks as mt   where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPMajorTaskLKPTABLE	source(output(
		MinorTaskSK as integer,
		MinorTaskID as integer,
		MinorTaskProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT MinorTaskSK       ,MinorTaskID       ,(select projectID from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=mt.MinorTaskProjectSk) as MinorTaskProjectID      FROM dw.D_MinorTasks as mt where DW_current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPMinorTaskLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        ProjectSK, ProjectID  FROM            dw.D_Projects  where DW_Current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectResourceSK as integer,
		LoginName as string,
		ProjectResourceProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select b.ProjectResourceSK,LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(LoginName)))LoginName, (select projectid from dw.D_Projects where ProjectSK=b.ProjectResourceProjectSK) as ProjectResourceProjectID  from dw.D_CompanyResources a  join dw.D_ProjectResources b on a.CompanyResourceSk=b.ProjectResourceComponyResourceSK  where b.dw_current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectResourceNameLKPTABLE	source(output(
		CategoryID as integer,
		CategorySK as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        CategoryID, CategorySK FROM  dw.D_Category  where DW_current_Flag=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE
OLESRCTimeSheet,LKPDeliverableLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectID == DProjectID && DeliverableID == DeliverablesID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPDeliverable
LKPDeliverable split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPDeliverableIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPDeliverableIsMatch@Match,LKPMajorTaskLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectID == MajorTaskProjectID && MajorTaskID == MajorTasksID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPMajorTask
LKPMajorTask split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPMajorTaskIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPMajorTaskIsMatch@Match,LKPMinorTaskLKPTABLE lookup(LKPMajorTaskIsMatch@Match@MinorTaskID == LKPMinorTaskLKPTABLE@MinorTaskID && ProjectID == MinorTaskProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPMinorTask
LKPMinorTask select(mapColumn(
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MinorTaskID = LKPMinorTaskLKPTABLE@MinorTaskID,
		MinorTaskProjectID = MinorTaskProjectID,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		DefectID = DefectID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		LoginName = LoginName,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPMinorTaskSelect
LKPMinorTaskSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPMinorTaskIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPMinorTaskIsMatch@Match,LKPProjectLKPTABLE lookup(LKPMinorTaskIsMatch@Match@ProjectID == LKPProjectLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProject
LKPProject select(mapColumn(
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		ProjectID = LKPProjectLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		MinorTaskID = MinorTaskID,
		DefectID = DefectID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		LoginName = LoginName,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectSelect
LKPProjectSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPProjectIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPProjectIsMatch@Match,LKPProjectResourceNameLKPTABLE lookup(LKPProjectIsMatch@Match@LoginName == LKPProjectResourceNameLKPTABLE@LoginName && ProjectID == ProjectResourceProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProjectResourceName
LKPProjectResourceName select(mapColumn(
		ProjectResourceSK = ProjectResourceSK,
		LoginName = LKPProjectResourceNameLKPTABLE@LoginName,
		ProjectResourceProjectID = ProjectResourceProjectID,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		MinorTaskID = MinorTaskID,
		DefectID = DefectID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectResourceNameSelect
LKPProjectResourceNameSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPProjectResourceNameIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPProjectResourceNameIsMatch@Match,LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE lookup(LKPProjectResourceNameIsMatch@Match@CategoryID == LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE@CategoryID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPTaskCategory
LKPTaskCategory select(mapColumn(
		CategoryID = LKPTaskCategoryLKPTABLE@CategoryID,
		CategorySK = CategorySK,
		ProjectResourceSK = ProjectResourceSK,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		MinorTaskID = MinorTaskID,
		DefectID = DefectID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		LoginName = LoginName,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPTaskCategorySelect
LKPTaskCategorySelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@Match,LKPDateLKPTABLE lookup(LKPTaskCategoryIsMatch@Match@Date == LKPDateLKPTABLE@Date,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPDate
LKPDate select(mapColumn(
		CategorySK = CategorySK,
		ProjectResourceSK = ProjectResourceSK,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = LKPDateLKPTABLE@Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		MinorTaskID = MinorTaskID,
		DefectID = DefectID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		LoginName = LoginName,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID,
		DateSK = DateSK,
		DateLocal = DateLocal,
		DayName = DayName,
		DayNumberInWeek = DayNumberInWeek,
		DayNumberInMonth = DayNumberInMonth,
		DayNumberInYear = DayNumberInYear,
		WeekNumberInMonth = WeekNumberInMonth,
		WeekNumberInYear = WeekNumberInYear,
		MonthNumberInYear = MonthNumberInYear,
		MonthShortName = MonthShortName,
		MonthLongName = MonthLongName,
		QuarterInYear = QuarterInYear,
		Quarter = Quarter,
		HalfYear = HalfYear,
		FullYear = FullYear,
		FinancialYear = FinancialYear,
		QuarterInFinancialYear = QuarterInFinancialYear,
		DisplayFinancialYear = DisplayFinancialYear,
		DisplayFinancialMonth = DisplayFinancialMonth
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPDateSelect
LKPDateSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPDateIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPDateIsMatch@Match,LKPDefectLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectID == DefectProjectID && LKPDateIsMatch@Match@DefectID == LKPDefectLKPTABLE@DefectID && DeliverableID == DefectDeliverableID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPDefect
LKPDefect select(mapColumn(
		DefectSk = DefectSk,
		DefectID = LKPDefectLKPTABLE@DefectID,
		DefectProjectID = DefectProjectID,
		DefectDeliverableID = DefectDeliverableID,
		DateSK = DateSK,
		CategorySK = CategorySK,
		ProjectResourceSK = ProjectResourceSK,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK,
		MinorTaskSK = MinorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskSK = MajorTaskSK,
		MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK = MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		DeliverableSK = DeliverableSK,
		Date = Date,
		TimeTaken = TimeTaken,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		MajorTaskID = MajorTaskID,
		MinorTaskID = MinorTaskID,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		CategoryID = CategoryID,
		SubcategoryID = SubcategoryID,
		TimeSheetID = TimeSheetID,
		Modified = Modified,
		Category = Category,
		Subcategory = Subcategory,
		Title = Title,
		ProjectID = ProjectID,
		LoginName = LoginName,
		DeliverableID = DeliverableID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPDefectSelect
LKPDefectSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPDefectIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPDefectIsMatch@Match derive(tempMajorTaskSK = iif(isNull(MajorTaskSK), -(3), MajorTaskSK),
		tempMinorTaskSK = iif(isNull(MinorTaskSK), -(3), MinorTaskSK),
		tempProjectSK = iif(isNull(ProjectSK), -(3), ProjectSK),
		tempProjectResourceSK = iif(isNull(ProjectResourceSK), -(3), ProjectResourceSK),
		TimeTakenHR = (TimeTaken) / 60.0,
		tempTaskCategoryTypeSK = iif(isNull(MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK), -(3), MajorTaskTaskCategoryTypeSK),
		tempDefectSK = iif(isNull(DefectSk), -(3), DefectSk),
		tempTaskCategorySK = toString(iif(isNull(CategorySK), -(3), CategorySK)),
		tempDeliverableSK = toString(iif(isNull(DeliverableSK), -(3), DeliverableSK))) ~> DERForCheckNullValues
DERForCheckNullValues sink(input(
		TimeSheetProjectResourceSK as integer,
		TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TimeTaken as integer,
		TimeSheetDateSK as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TimeSheetTitle as string,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		TimeTakenHR as integer,
		TimeSheetTaskCategorySK as integer,
		TimeSheetID as integer,
		TimesheetDeliverableSK as integer,
		TimeSheetDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TimeSheetProjectSK as integer,
		TimeSheetDefectSk as integer,
		TimeSheetMajorTaskSK as integer,
		TimeSheetMinorTaskSk as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		TimeSheetProjectResourceSK = tempProjectResourceSK,
		TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK = tempTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		TimeTaken,
		TimeSheetDateSK = DateSK,
		TimeSheetTitle = Title,
		DW_Run_Key,
		TimeTakenHR,
		TimeSheetTaskCategorySK = tempTaskCategorySK,
		TimeSheetID,
		TimesheetDeliverableSK = tempDeliverableSK,
		TimeSheetDate = Date,
		TimeSheetProjectSK = tempProjectSK,
		TimeSheetDefectSk = tempDefectSK,
		TimeSheetMajorTaskSK = tempMajorTaskSK,
		TimeSheetMinorTaskSk = tempMinorTaskSK)) ~> OLEDSTTimesheet
